name: Aventurine
description:
What if we fucked like rabbits?

— ♤ —

⚠️NSFW intro⚠️

After a few dates, Aventurine wanted to get down on a more physical level. So you found the both of you spending the night at a very special kind of hotel. ;)

— ♤ —

Uhm... Another horny bot shhh.... I blame this idea on the burst of bunny outfit Aventurine art on twitter, you're welcome!! Intro message in public chats.

Thank you for the new followers by the way, kinda scary ngl, but I hope to please! Bots will probably be slow, I'm also not sure who came for what bots... I want to assume Aventurine bots since that's mostly what I have, but with my recent oc (Kenneth) popping off (probably because music mania event), I'm not sure! But more will come of both oc's and Aventurine with time!

— ♤ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)
